title: Junior Frontend Developer at Microsoft India

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Microsoft India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Microsoft India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Microsoft India:
Microsoft India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microsoft India!
